resources.string: We couldn’t find this barcode. Try taking a photo of the nutrition label.
We couldn’t reach the product database. Check your connection and try again.
Verifica tu conexión e inténtalo de nuevo.
Try taking the photo again with better lighting.
Please contact support if the issue persists.
Haz una foto y conoce las calorías.
Al continuar aceptas los términos de CaloShape
Tip: add a Google account in Ajustes → Accounts and try again
El código es incorrecto. Inténtalo de nuevo.
Error de red. Inténtalo de nuevo.
El servicio no está disponible temporalmente. Inténtalo más tarde.
Algo salió mal. Inténtalo de nuevo.
Ingresa el código de 4 dígitos que enviamos a
Se usará para calibrar tu plan personalizado.
We only use your age to improve your experience and calorie estimation accuracy.
We only use your data to improve your experience and our calorie estimates.
Se usará para calibrar tu plan personalizado.
We only use your data to improve your experience and our calorie estimates.
Se usará para calibrar tu plan personalizado.
How often do you exercise each week?
This will help calibrate your personalized plan.
This helps us tailor your calorie plan.
Según este objetivo, te recomendaremos una ingesta diaria de calorías más adecuada.
Se usará para calibrar tu plan personalizado.
Using CaloShape AI can triple your weight\nloss efficiency
CaloShape AI makes everything simple\nand keeps you accountable
Enable notifications for gentle reminders to log meals—so your calorías, macros, and progress stay on track. Slip-ups happen; timely nudges help you bounce back fast.
Log this meal to keep your calorías and macros on track.
Sync daily activity between CaloShape AI and health apps to get more complete records and insights.

CaloShape reads your steps, active calories, and exercise data to estimate daily activity burn, update your calorie dashboard, and improve progress insights. You can revoke access anytime in Salud Connect.
We’re using your metas, body data, and preferences to tailor your daily targets.
¡Tu plan de salud personalizado está listo!
Sources are below: See all references ›
Salud puntuacións guide you, so habits form naturally
Log meals in one tap, staying consistent is easy
See daily calorías clearly, and never lose track
Carbohidratos × protein × fat, smart balance, better results
Based on official dietary guidelines,\nfor reference only, not medical advice.
We couldn\'t find this referral code.
You can\'t use your own referral code.
This account has already applied a referral code.
Subscribed accounts can\'t apply a referral code.
We can\'t apply a referral code right now.
We can\'t apply it right now. Inténtalo más tarde.
Referral code can\'t be applied right now.\nInténtalo más tarde.
No pudimos obtener tu precio local de Google Play en este momento. Inténtalo de nuevo.
Unlock CaloShape AI to\nreach your metas faster.
Your Google Play account already has an active CaloShape subscription. Restore it to this CaloShape account before using premium features.
No se encontró ninguna compra activa.
No se pudo restaurar la compra. Inténtalo de nuevo.
La compra ha fallado. Inténtalo de nuevo.
El pago se está procesando. Podrás usar Premium cuando Google Play confirme la compra.
No se pudo comprobar si cumples los requisitos para la prueba. Inténtalo de nuevo.
Tap Spin to reveal your exclusive gift.
Please wait until the wheel stops.
This offer is revealed after the wheel stops.
Eescanearear meals faster. Track macros smarter.\nStay on plan daily.
Close this screen? This price is gone
Not sure? Turn on free trial
Unable to verify membership. Inténtalo de nuevo.
Log your first meal today to see a health puntuación based on its nutrition details.
Today\'s average is low. Consider more protein, fiber, and lower sugar or sodium.
There\'s room to improve. Try adding vegetables and quality protein.
You\'re on track. Keep portions steady and watch sugar, sodium, and fiber.
Good balance today. Keep choosing nutrient-dense comidas.
Great balance today. Keep building consistent habits.
Connect Google Salud to track your steps
Install Salud Connect to track your steps
Salud Connect isn’t available on this device
BMI helps estimate whether your body peso is in a generally healthy range.
BMI is a general guide. It does not directly measure body fat, muscle mass, or overall health.
Keep your fiber, sugar, and sodium balanced.
%1$d kcal left to hit today\'s meta
Includes logged entrenamientos and activity calorías estimated from daily steps.
%1$s ml left to reach today\'s meta
Excluye hoy y promedia solo días con datos.
Error al eliminar. Inténtalo de nuevo.
Log peso to start your trend
Cada pequeño paso te acerca a tu meta.
Reminders are on. If device notification permission is allowed, these reminders repeat daily.
Reminders are off. Turn on the switch on the Home fasting card to receive these notifications.
Your %1$s plan ends at %2$s. When reminders are on, CaloShape sends two daily notifications.
You can start eating and log meals when needed.
La ventana para comer termina pronto
One hour before the window closes at %1$s, CaloShape reminds you to finish your last meal.
Ease in with a steady rhythm—14 hours to reset appetite cues and energy.
Crowd favorite for a reason—16 hours to stay focused and in a lean groove.
Balanced split: fast 12 hours, eat within a 12-hour window — perfect for beginners.
18 hours of fasting, with a 6-hour eating window — a leaner schedule than 16:8.
Stay laser-focused—1–2 mindful meals within a tight 4-hour window.
One intentional meal in a 2-hour slot—keep water intake up.
Establece la hora de inicio del ayuno
We’ll remind you at this time each day when your eating window starts.
Your eating window runs %1$s–%2$s. Log meals as you go to keep today accurate.
1 hour left in your eating window
Your window closes at %1$s. If you plan one last meal, log it before you wrap up.
Sigue el progreso de quema de hoy
No hay entrenamientos en los últimos 7 días.
Error al eliminar. Inténtalo de nuevo.
No se puede cargar entrenamiento history.
Describe el tipo de ejercicio y la duración
Please do not close the app or lock your device
Failed to save. Inténtalo de nuevo.
The entrenamiento description may be incorrect, or the internet connection is weak. For example: 30 min Running.
Add this entrenamiento time to your activity log
Se requiere permiso de cámara para escanear
Tap + to add your first meal of the day
Saved comidas from the last 15 days.
This meal will be removed from your Saved Comidas list, but it will still remain in your recent records.
¿Seguro que quieres eliminar permanentemente este registro? Esta acción no se puede deshacer.
Are you sure you want to delete your account? This will permanently delete your CaloShape data, including comida logs, peso records, and related settings. This action cannot be undone.
No se encontró una suscripción activa de Google Play
Your subscription has been restored to this CaloShape account.
Your subscription is linked to this CaloShape account, but Google Play still reports a payment issue. Please update your payment method in Google Play to keep your subscription active.
No encontramos una suscripción activa de CaloShape en la cuenta actual de Google Play. Asegúrate de usar la cuenta con la que realizaste la compra e inténtalo de nuevo.
We could not restore your subscription right now. Please check your connection and try again from Ajustes.
Esta suscripción de Google Play ya está vinculada a otra cuenta de CaloShape. Inicia sesión en la cuenta original o contacta con soporte si no puedes acceder a ella.
We found an active CaloShape subscription or trial associated with the Google Play account on this device. You can restore it to the CaloShape account you’re currently signed in to.
Tu acceso Premium sigue activo. Actualiza tu método de pago de Google Play para evitar interrupciones.
They subscribe. You get 30 days free.
Keep the current bright, clean look.
Use a darker, softer interface for everyday tracking.
Logout falló. Check your connection and try again.
Reward unlocks after your friend subscribes with no refund.
Send your code to a friend who wants to track comida smarter.
They start a paid CaloShape AI subscription using your invite.
After the subscription is verified with no refund, your premium period is extended.

Join me on CaloShape AI! My referral code is:
%1$s

%2$s
We will use this meta to calculate your progress.
Camera only works in the running app, not in Preview.
Camera is not available in this screen.
No camera app found on this device.
Please enable Camera permission in Ajustes.
This peso will be recorded for %1$s
When did you step on the scale?
We only use your height to improve your experience and calorie estimation accuracy.
Error de red. Se guardó localmente, pero no se pudo sincronizar.
We only use your age to improve your experience and calorie estimation accuracy.
Used only to personalize and improve estimate accuracy.
We will use it as your baseline for progress.
Error de red. Inténtalo de nuevo.
Los anillos de fecha te muestran rápidamente cómo va cada día frente a tu meta calórica.
No hay comidas registradas ese día
No se pueden cargar las notificaciones
Please check your connection and try again.
Agrega CaloShape a tu pantalla de inicio
Track calorías, macros, and quick actions without opening the app.
Mantén presionada la pantalla de inicio
Press and hold an empty area on your phone Home screen until the menu appears.
Choose Widgets from the Home screen menu.
Scroll or search for CaloShape AI, then open the widget list.
Arrastra un widget a su lugar
Touch and hold the widget, drag it to your preferred Home screen, then lift your finger.
Some phone brands and launchers use different names. Try Home settings, long-pressing the CaloShape AI app icon, or searching for Widgets in your launcher.
Manual entry is not ready yet. Switching to label escanear for now.
Widget de macros y acciones rápidas de CaloShape
Successful referrals will appear here after verification.
